title: Update
body: 2.0.3 What's New?: ✅Added Smoothing system for camera Three configurable sliders in the menu: • Position: Positional movement smoothing -Rotation: Rotation/orientation smoothing -Snap to Object: Auto-adjustment to selected object ⚠️Note: The Snap slider doesn't work very well for now. It's recommended to keep it at 0. I'll keep investigating and improving its functionality in future versions. Echo Echo Echo Echo Echo testing more... counter-clockwise test testing
